analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of https://dynamic.xyz/docs crawled 2626 of 2680 requested pages (100% coverage). 45 confirmed broken internal documentation links were identified, with 9 additional links unverified due to authentication or rate-limiting. API reference coverage stands at 62.5% across 1486 detected API pages. SEO/metadata issues affect 21.12% of pages, and only 12.95% of pages display last-updated timestamps. Overall audit confidence is 84.83%.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved (100% of in-scope pages)
Large documentation footprint with 2626 pages successfully crawled
1486 API pages detected indicating substantial API documentation presence
risks: 45 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrade user navigation and trust
API reference coverage gap of 37.5% leaves significant API surface undocumented
SEO/metadata issues on 21.12% of pages harm discoverability and search ranking
Only 12.95% freshness visibility prevents users from assessing content currency
Example code reliability estimate of 73.21% suggests potential broken or outdated code samples
9 unverified links may include additional broken links masked by authentication barriers
Low freshness coverage creates uncertainty about documentation maintenance cadence

prioritized_actions.action: Repair all 45 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Close API reference coverage gap from 62.5% to 90%+ by documenting missing endpoints
Implement last-updated timestamps on all pages (currently 12.95% coverage)
Resolve SEO/metadata issues affecting 21.12% of pages (missing descriptions, titles, or structured data)
Audit and update example code to improve 73.21% reliability estimate

limitations: External audit cannot verify content technical accuracy or correctness of code examples
9 unverified links blocked by authentication or rate-limiting may hide additional broken links
Crawl cannot assess internal tooling, staging environments, or access-restricted documentation sections
API coverage detection relies on heuristics; actual endpoint completeness requires internal API inventory comparison
Freshness analysis limited to visible last-updated metadata; actual content currency requires subject matter expert review
